# MotorVault

> MotorVault is an e-commerce platform for automotive parts and accessories, focused on clear product details, shipping/returns guidance, and secure checkout.

Use this file as a curated entrypoint for LLMs and agents. Prefer policy and support pages for factual answers, then use product pages for item-level details.

## Store

- [Homepage](https://motorvault.shop/): Brand and catalog overview.
- [Products](https://motorvault.shop/products): Primary product discovery and filtering page.
- [About](https://motorvault.shop/about): Company background and sourcing standards.

## Policies And Support

- [Shipping](https://motorvault.shop/shipping): Shipping expectations, timeframes, and coverage guidance.
- [Returns](https://motorvault.shop/returns): Returns and refund policy details.
- [FAQ](https://motorvault.shop/faq): Common operational and purchase questions.
- [Contact](https://motorvault.shop/contact): Official support contact form.
- [Help](https://motorvault.shop/help): Customer support entrypoint and assistance details.

## Machine-Readable Discovery

- [Robots](https://motorvault.shop/robots.txt): Crawl directives and sitemap pointers.
- [Primary Sitemap](https://motorvault.shop/sitemap.xml): Index of key public pages.
- [Product Sitemap](https://motorvault.shop/sitemap-products.xml): Product URL inventory for catalog discovery.
- [Product Feed](https://motorvault.shop/feed.xml): Merchant-style product feed for integrations.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://motorvault.shop/privacy): Privacy and data-use terms.
- [Terms](https://motorvault.shop/terms): Terms and conditions.
- [Cookies](https://motorvault.shop/cookies): Cookie usage and controls.
- [Accessibility](https://motorvault.shop/accessibility): Accessibility commitments and support.
